author: Robby Sneiderman
name: SwiGLU + EMA + TTT Memorization Analysis
blurb: SwiGLU MLP (mult=2.0), EMA (0.9985), int5 quantization, 5% pruning, zstd-22. Verified 1.1679 BPB (no TTT, standard sliding eval). Includes TTT memorization analysis: multi-epoch TTT produces scores as low as 0.86 BPB but independent sliding-window diagnostic reveals memorization. We provide a framework for distinguishing genuine TTT adaptation from test-set memorization.
